ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting for this choice. 'Always' forces the one-page modal even if disabled globally; 'Never' disables it even if enabled globally.
ast.target: 为此选项覆盖全局设置。“始终”将强制使用单页模态窗口，即使全局已禁用；“从不”将禁用它，即使全局已启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to arrange the new pane relative to the current one
ast.target: 如何相对于当前窗格排列新窗格

ast.source: How to display the opened file
ast.target: 如何显示已打开的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus the opened tab immediately after opening
ast.target: 打开后立即聚焦已打开的标签页

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced / legacy: this executes any `<% %>` anywhere in the destination file (including inside code blocks).
ast.target: 高级/旧版：这会在目标文件的任意位置执行 `<% %>`（包括代码块内）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether this Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}}. Does not affect {{SELECTED}}.
ast.target: 控制此 Capture 是否使用当前编辑器选区作为 {{VALUE}}。不影响 {{SELECTED}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Supports format syntax (use trailing '/' for folders).
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 的路径。支持格式语法（文件夹请使用末尾的“/”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a file, folder, or format syntax (e.g., {{DATE}})
ast.target: 选择文件、文件夹或格式语法（例如 {{DATE}}）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a card from the canvas below, or paste an exact node id.
ast.target: 从下方画布选择一张卡片，或粘贴精确的节点 id。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Formats the value as a task.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the captured file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向所捕获文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the link when appending
ast.target: 追加时将链接放置在何处

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.
ast.target: 在指定文本之后插入捕获内容。接受格式语法。提示：使用标题（以 # 开头）来定位章节。空行处理可在下方配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).
ast.target: 将捕获内容插入同一行，紧接匹配文本之后（不添加换行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.
ast.target: 将匹配文本之后到行末的内容全部替换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.
ast.target: 将文本放在匹配章节的末尾，而不是顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also include the section’s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.
ast.target: 同时包含该章节的子章节（要求目标为以 # 开头的标题）。子章节是该章节内的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.
ast.target: 如果未找到，则创建“插入在后面”的行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format of the capture.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create the file in the specified folder. If multiple folders are specified, you will be prompted for which folder to create the file in.
ast.target: 在指定文件夹中创建文件。如果指定了多个文件夹，将提示你选择在哪个文件夹中创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.
ast.target: 创建笔记时，将提示你从所选文件夹及其子文件夹中进行选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the file in the same folder as the currently active file. Will not create the file if there is no active file.
ast.target: 在当前活动文件所在的文件夹中创建文件。如果没有活动文件，则不会创建文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the created file in the current note.
ast.target: 选择 QuickAdd 应如何在当前笔记中插入指向已创建文件的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set default behavior rather then prompting user on what to do if a file already exists.
ast.target: 设置默认行为，而不是在文件已存在时提示用户如何处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model the AI Assistant will use
ast.target: AI 助手将使用的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.
ast.target: 用于存储 AI 助手输出的变量名称，即 {{value:output}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元在当前文本中的出现频率进行惩罚，降低模型逐字重复同一行的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值会根据新词元是否已出现在当前文本中进行惩罚，提高模型谈论新话题的可能性。默认值为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.
ast.target: 文件路径。支持 {{DATE}}、{{VALUE}} 等格式化。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when an input prompt is cancelled without submitting. Disable this to avoid extra notices when dismissing prompts.
ast.target: 输入提示未提交而被取消时显示通知。禁用此项以避免在关闭提示时出现额外通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt
ast.target: 使用多行输入提示而非单行输入提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep drafts when closing input prompts so they can be restored on reopen. Drafts are stored only for this session.
ast.target: 关闭输入提示时保留草稿，以便重新打开时恢复。草稿仅在本次会话中保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}} and may skip the prompt. When disabled, Capture always prompts for {{VALUE}}.
ast.target: 启用后，Capture 会将当前编辑器选区作为 {{VALUE}}，并可能跳过提示。禁用后，Capture 始终提示输入 {{VALUE}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcodes for natural language date parsing. One per line: alias = phrase. Example: tm = tomorrow.
ast.target: 用于自然语言日期解析的短码。每行一个：alias = phrase。示例：tm = tomorrow。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, including contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.
ast.target: 此项会阻止插件向 OpenAI 等外部提供商发起请求。你仍可使用用户脚本执行任意代码，包括联系外部提供商。然而，该设置会禁用 AI 助手等插件功能的相关请求。若要使用 AI 助手，需要禁用此设置。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 将 QuickAdd 图标添加到侧边栏功能区。需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.source:
Import QuickAdd Package

Select a package file, review conflicts, and choose how to import each item.
ast.target:
导入QuickAdd包

选择包文件，查看冲突，并选择导入方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to insert a regular link or an embed when replacing the selection.
ast.target: 选择插入链接或嵌入替换选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether replacing the selection should insert a link or an embed.
ast.target: 选择替换选择时插入链接或嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will have the assistant use the prompt template you specify. If disable, the assistant will ask you for a prompt template to use.
ast.target: 启用则使用指定提示模板；禁用则询问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The system prompt for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show advanced settings such as temperature, top p, and frequency penalty.
ast.target: 显示高级设置，如温度、top p 和频率惩罚。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sampling temperature. Higher values like 0.8 makes the output more random, whereas lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. The default is 1.
ast.target: 采样温度。高值如0.8输出更随机，低值如0.2更集中。默认1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Nucleus sampling - consider this an alternative to temperature. The model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens compromising the top 10% probability mass are considered. The default is 1.
ast.target: 核采样 - 温度替代。考虑top_p概率质量。0.1表示前10%。默认1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional export or member to call (use :: to access nested members).
ast.target: 可选导出或调用成员（使用::访问嵌套成员）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your folder with prompt templates

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default system prompt for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display release notes when a new version is installed. This includes new features, demo videos, and bug fixes.
ast.target: 新版本安装时显示发布说明，含新功能、演示视频和错误修复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, template variables in front matter will be formatted as proper Obsidian property types. Arrays become List properties, numbers become Number properties, booleans become Checkbox properties, etc. This is a beta feature that may have edge cases.
ast.target: 启用后，模板变量格式化为Obsidian属性类型。数组变列表，数字变数字，布尔变复选框。测试功能，可能有边缘情况。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the folder where templates are stored. Used to suggest template files when configuring QuickAdd.
ast.target: 模板存储文件夹路径。配置QuickAdd时建议模板文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Experimental. Resolve variables up front and show a single dynamic form before executing Template/Capture choices. See Advanced → One-page Inputs in docs.
ast.target: 实验功能：提前解析变量，执行前显示动态表单。见高级→单页输入文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens in each chunk, calculated as the chunk token size + prompt template token size + system prompt token size. Make sure you leave room for the model to respond to the prompt.
ast.target: 最大令牌数（块+提示模板+系统提示），预留响应空间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Merge chunks together by putting them in the same prompt, until the max tokens limit is reached. Useful for sending fewer queries overall, but may result in less coherent responses.
ast.target: 合并块至提示，达令牌限。减少查询，可能影响连贯性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Run Templater on entire destination file after capture

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Format template variables as proper property types (Beta)

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Canvas note: 'At cursor' and 'New line above/below cursor' are not supported for Canvas card capture. Use top, bottom, or insert-after placement.
ast.target: Canvas：不支持 'At cursor' 和 'New line above/below cursor' 捕获。使用 top、bottom、insert-after。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use QuickAdd template folder instead of Obsidian templates plugin folder / Templater templates folder.
ast.target: 使用 QuickAdd 模板文件夹，而非 Obsidian/Templater 模板文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 'Increment file name' setting moved to 'Set default behavior if file already exists' setting
ast.target: '递增文件名' 设置移至 '文件存在时默认行为' 设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove macro indirection - embed macros directly in macro choices
ast.target: 移除宏间接，直接嵌入宏选择。

regex.target: log(`${this.constructor.name} 合并 ${Z} 和 ${a} 至 ${m}`)
log(`提取时区：'${d}' 至：${m} 为：${t.start}`)

regex.source: log(`${this.constructor.name} adjusted ${G} time from the ref date (${c}) to the following day (${b})`)
